summary: Completed as an observability result, not a behavior proof. The kernel reached mmcblk0, entered the forced CMD18 IDMA path, applied the H021 MSI/IOMMU subset, read CCU NSI state as ccu_nsi=0x43000005 and ccu_bus_nsi=0x00010000, and dumped NSI ports through iommu1/port 15. UART then stopped before any NSI-minimum write result, post-nsi-minimum dump, dma-entry dump, descriptor dump, or mount evidence. This initially made CPU port reads suspect, so H024 repeated the test without CPU0/CPU1 IAG reads.
